SNTM-STACK v1.0
binary: target/riscv64imac-unknown-none-elf/release/task_recursion
arch: rv64
mode: sum-of-frames (over-approximation)
caveat: call-graph-aware transitive analysis post-SAFE

frames:
  0x80900000  recursive_a                        64 byte
  0x80900080  recursive_b                        48 byte

direct_call_edges: 2
indirect_calls: 0
recursion: recursive_a -> recursive_b -> recursive_a

status: FAIL
reason: recursion (call graph cycle) detected
max_stack_bytes: 0xFFFFFFFF
